do_now.title: RE: [External] Max Dourish—Feb 19
do_now.body:
Thank you so much for letting us know. We are wishing him much better soon!

Warm Regards
Ms. Prescott

From: Alexandra Hartnett <ahartnet@gmail.com>
Sent: Thursday, February 19, 2026 8:24 AM
To: Churchill Attendance <ChurchillRoadElem.Attendance@fcps.edu>; Anthony Dourish <sol9001@gmail.com>

reference_emails.subject: Successful payment at Keep2Share / Shipping Advisors
reference_emails.body:
Hello,

30 days was successfully added to your k2s account.

You will be able to see this operation in your bank statement as "Shipping Advisors"

Detailed information:

Order number: 61035648
Transaction number: SB-54290098/55997309/pay_jDzKLmnQTwmIkpSHTEXA
You'll be charged approximately $41.99.
The final amount may differ due to exchange rates and your bank’s conversion fees.
